# SOCC Documentation

SOCC documentation follows a simple split:

- `README.md` is the entrypoint for first contact
- `docs/` is the canonical reference for setup, operations, architecture, and contribution

Use the sections below as your starting point.

SOCC is a security operations copiloto focused on threat intelligence, suspicious artifact triage, investigation support, and incident response workflows.

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 2
:caption: Installation

install/requirements
install/quickstart
install/windows
install/advanced-setup
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 2
:caption: Configuration

configuration/providers
configuration/litellm
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 2
:caption: Operations

operations/runtime-hardening
operations/headless-grpc
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 2
:caption: Architecture

architecture/overview
architecture/runtime
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: Contributing

contributing/index
```

```{toctree}
:hidden:

advanced-setup
litellm-setup
non-technical-setup
quick-start-mac-linux
quick-start-windows
```

- [Security Policy](https://github.com/nilsonpmjr/socc/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
- [Contribution Guidelines](https://github.com/nilsonpmjr/socc/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Repository Root](https://github.com/nilsonpmjr/socc)
